title: The Franky Family’s Attack
description: Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We have plenty of money!! haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just you wait! I'll get you back!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Go to the frankies' place alone?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you're that softy long-nose's captain!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky Family
dialogue.text: I'll give you a free hit,

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Hahah! I'm going to laugh to death!!

summary: Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.
